articles.title: What is FIFA World Cup trophy made of? Price breakdown, history and everything you need to know
articles.description: The most coveted object in global sport is also one the winner will never legally own. When a nation lifts the FIFA World Cup Trophy, they hold roughly $713,000 worth of solid 18-carat gold above their heads for precisely as long as FIFA allows, which is not long at all. What happens next is a quiet, contractual handover that most fans never see coming.

articles.title: FIFA World Cup: Canada draw with Bosnia-Herzegovina to earn first-ever World Cup point
articles.description: Co-hosts Canada grabbed a second-half equalizer to draw 1-1 with Bosnia and Herzegovina in Toronto on Friday, earning their first-ever point at a World Cup. Cyle Larin levelled for the home team in the 78th minute after Jovo Lukic put Bosnia ahead midway through the first half in the first World Cup finals game played on Canadian soil.
